transcription.text: Give wings to your heart with Northwest Airmanship. You fly as you've never flown before. Fly the best when you fly Northwest, Northwest Orient. Going to Tokyo, Manila, Hong Kong, anywhere in the Orient, fly the shortest, fastest route, Northwest Orient Airlines. Northwest Great Circle Shortcut saves you 846 miles across the Pacific and Northwest flies radar-smooth DC-7Cs, America's fastest, quietest, long-range airliners. So fly the shortest, fastest route to the Orient. Fly Northwest, daily first-class and tourist service from Seattle. See your travel agent or Northwest Orient.
